content: Bot timing detection: compute inter-arrival times (IATs) from sorted createdAt. Validated metrics: (1) time-interval ENTROPY -- periodic bots fire on fixed timers => low IAT entropy vs humans' high entropy (Gianvecchio USENIX'08; Nature Sci Rep 2022 DNA/relative-entropy). (2) coefficient of variation (std/mean) of IATs -- machine-regular timing => CV near 0. (3) burst/volume spikes -- many events in a short window. CAUTION from deepfry spam-clusters spike: raw timestamp clustering is dominated by FALSE POSITIVES (crawler refresh batching, popular-client default writes); same-second clusters of high-degree accounts are artifacts, not bots. Timing must be combined with other signals, never standalone.
